Users can delete automations in their or.name: Users can delete automations in their org
Users can delete automations in their or.using:
(organization_id IN ( SELECT member."organizationId"
   FROM member
  WHERE (member."userId" = auth.uid())))

Users can view automations in their org.name: Users can view automations in their org

configurations_cli_requires_path.name: configurations_cli_requires_path
configurations_cli_requires_path.value: ((user_id IS NOT NULL) AND (local_path_hash IS NOT NULL)) OR ((user_id IS NULL) AND (local_path_hash IS NULL))

session_pull_requests_state_check.name: session_pull_requests_state_check
session_pull_requests_state_check.value: pull_request_state IS NULL OR pull_request_state = ANY (ARRAY['open'::text, 'closed'::text, 'merged'::text, 'draft'::text])
